rationale: Educ. Code §11.166 governs school district programs on higher education campuses. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may operate a school or program or hold a class on the campus of an institution of higher education in this state if the board obtains written consent from the president or other chief executive officer of the institution.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no interaction between the two provisions.
